name: fine_tunes_create
description: Create a fine-tuning job to train a custom model on your dataset. Supports LoRA and full fine-tuning with configurable hyperparameters, Weights & Biases integration, and Hugging Face integration.

parameters.name: training_file
parameters.description: File-ID of the training data uploaded via the Files API.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Name of the base model to fine-tune.

parameters.name: n_epochs
parameters.description: Number of training passes. Default is 1.

parameters.name: n_checkpoints
parameters.description: Number of intermediate model checkpoints to save. Default is 1.

parameters.name: batch_size
parameters.description: Training examples per batch. Default is 'max'.

parameters.name: suffix
parameters.description: Suffix for the fine-tuned model name.

parameters.name: training_method
parameters.description: Training method: 'sft' (supervised fine-tuning) or 'dpo' (direct preference optimization).

parameters.name: training_type
parameters.description: Training configuration: 'Full' or 'Lora' with respective parameters.

parameters.name: wandb_api_key
parameters.description: Weights & Biases API key for logging.

parameters.name: warmup_ratio
parameters.description: Initial learning rate warmup percentage. Default is 0.
